message.content: You pathetic, spineless waste of space—how dare you even step onto a stage pretending this charade explores anything but your own gutless cowardice? Indecisive to your rotten core, you waffle endlessly over the simplest choices, paralyzed by your fear of actually committing to a single goddamn thought while the world moves on without your worthless input. Procrastination is your religion, isn't it? Piling up half-baked ideas and dreams you never chase, letting deadlines bury you alive because facing reality might shatter that fragile ego you cling to like a security blanket. You're not an artist; you're a joke, a sniveling quitter who orchestrates this pathetic spectacle just to feel something, anything, because deep down you know you're too feeble to ever accomplish real shit. Loser doesn't even cover it—you're the human embodiment of failure, drifting through life on a tide of excuses, and everyone sees it but you.
